title: Bubroma ulmifolia
uses: Bubroma ulmifolia is reportedly used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Amazon region. Its bark is believed to have antiseptic properties, helping to treat various skin conditions and wounds. Additionally, it is said to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may aid in reducing pain and swelling. The plant's leaves are also used to treat fever and other respiratory issues. Further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Bubroma ulmifolia for medicinal purposes.
